Note.title: Revision Note
Note.description: A single revision note with content and metadata.

content.description: The main content of the note.

category.description: The subject or category of the note.

tags.description: A list of tags for the note.

createdAt.description: The time the note was created.

userId.description: The user who created the note.

relatedNoteIds.description: A list of IDs for related notes.

Summary.title: Note Summary
Summary.description: An AI-generated summary of a revision note.

noteId.description: The ID of the parent note.

createdAt.description: The time the summary was generated.

/notes/{noteId}/summaries/{summaryId}.description: Summaries associated with a specific note.
